title: crataegus pruinosa
intro: Crataegus pruinosa, also known as the downy hawthorn, is a species of hawthorn tree or shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic effects. The health benefits of Crataegus pruinosa include reducing cardiovascular risk factors, lowering blood pressure, and improving lipid profiles, as well as providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress and inflammation. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and extracts, often in combination with other herbs, to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
